results.title: America250 vs Freedom 250. What’s the difference?
results.description: America250 and Freedom 250 are leading competing efforts to mark the nation’s 250th anniversary. Here’s how their plans and controversies differ.

results.title: Mullooley asks if Ireland’s EU Presidency will make a difference
results.description: A Midlands North West MEP is asking whether Ireland’s EU Presidency will make any difference to the wider population. On today’s Greg Hughes Show, Ciaran Mullooley said there is potential for a lot of good to come out of the next six months, but questioned whether the government will take those opportunities. He said a [...] The post Mullooley asks if Ireland’s EU Presidency will make a difference appeared first on Highland Radio - Latest Donegal News and Sport .

results.title: Kalinga tribe leaders reaffirm support for Batong Buhay mining project
results.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Balatoc Kalinga Tribe Inc. (BKTI) denounced statements circulating online about its supposed opposition of the group on the Batong Buhay mining project in Pasil, Kalinga, describing the claims as ‘false and misleading’. results.title: U.S. strength has deep roots, Stuart editor explained on July 4, 1976
results.description: Former Stuart News editor said in 1976 that U.S. strength comes from centuries of inherited democratic, legal and religious traditions.
